title: Swapp - Car Rental
description: Improving booking conversion rate from 1.3 to 3%
problem: The existing car rental checkout process had high abandonment rates and complex user flows, leading to poor conversion rates and frustrated customers.
whatIDid: Analyzed user drop-off points, redesigned the checkout flow with A/B testing, improved information hierarchy, and implemented a cleaner interface that increased conversion rates.
overview: Redesigning the rental experience for both tenants and landlords to improve conversion rates and user satisfaction.
goal: To redesign the car rental booking experience to increase conversion rates from 1.3% to 3% while maintaining a seamless user experience.

content.text: Swapp was experiencing low conversion rates in their car rental booking process. Users were dropping off at various points in the journey, leading to a conversion rate of only 1.3%.

items: Complex booking flow with too many steps

content.text: I conducted user research to understand the pain points in the current booking experience. This included user interviews, analytics analysis, and competitive research.
I redesigned the booking flow to reduce the number of steps and make the process more intuitive.

results: The redesigned booking experience led to a significant improvement in conversion rates, achieving the target of 3% conversion rate. User satisfaction scores also improved by 40%.

finalScreens.title: Homepage
finalScreens.description: Redesigned homepage with clear value proposition
